seo.title: Diana | Chicago UGC Creator
seo.description: Chicago-based UGC creator specializing in beauty, lifestyle, travel, and product storytelling.

hero.title: Diana
hero.description: I create beauty, lifestyle, and travel content that feels natural, thoughtful, and genuinely worth watching.
hero.location: Based in Chicago, IL · Available worldwide

about.title: Content that feels genuinely human.
about.text: My content blends clean visuals with a natural point of view. I focus on creating work that feels polished enough for a brand, but personal enough for people to trust.

values.title: Authentic delivery
values.text: Natural storytelling instead of overly scripted advertising.

values.title: Detail-oriented
values.text: Thoughtful lighting, framing, hooks, pacing, and product presentation.

values.title: Bilingual creator
values.text: Content available in English or Russian depending on your audience.

values.title: Reliable process
values.text: Clear communication, organized workflow, and on-time delivery.

statement.text: Real moments. Thoughtful visuals. Content your audience can trust.

videoSection.title: UGC video
videoSection.description: Short-form concepts for Reels, TikTok, organic social, and paid campaigns across beauty, lifestyle, and travel.

photoSection.title: UGC photography
photoSection.description: Lifestyle imagery for social media, websites, email campaigns, and product pages.

services.title: UGC Videos
services.text: Vertical short-form content for organic social media and paid advertising.

services.title: Product Photography
services.text: Clean lifestyle images for social posts, websites, and product listings.

services.title: Voiceover & Tutorials
services.text: Natural voiceover, demos, routines, reviews, and how-to content.

services.title: Raw Footage
services.text: High-quality unedited clips your team can repurpose into multiple creatives.

services.title: Hook Variations
services.text: Alternate hooks, CTAs, and versions for creative testing.

services.title: Monthly Packages
services.text: Ongoing content bundles for brands that need consistent fresh creative.

steps.title: Brief
steps.text: You share the product, goals, deliverables, timeline, and target audience.

steps.title: Concept
steps.text: We agree on creative direction, scope, usage rights, and rate.

steps.title: Create
steps.text: I film and edit the content based on the approved campaign details.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.text: You receive polished final files with the agreed revision round included.

campaignSection.title: Built around your campaign.
campaignSection.description: Every project is quoted based on deliverables, creative scope, turnaround time, and how the content will be used.
campaignSection.rateText: Paid usage, whitelisting, and exclusivity are quoted separately.

contactSection.title: Let’s create something people actually want to watch.
contactSection.description: Based in Chicago, IL · Available for U.S. and international collaborations.
